cycle_life.label: Cycle life baseline
cycle_life.description: Baseline durability screening with periodic reference checks.

hppc.label: HPPC screening
hppc.description: Pulse power characterization across a SOC staircase.

performance.label: Performance characterization
performance.description: Minimum recommended package for a performance-focused pretest campaign.

rate_capability.label: Rate capability
rate_capability.description: Rate ladder to compare utilization across discharge C-rates.

rpt.label: Reference performance test
rpt.description: Minimum recommended package for an RPT check-up bundle.

soc_ocv.label: SOC-OCV / slow curve
soc_ocv.description: Slow-rate curve test for OCV/EMF estimation and modelling-ready voltage traces.

soh_modeling.label: SOH modeling
soh_modeling.description: Minimum recommended package for model-training or model-validation data collection.

calendar_ageing.label: Calendar ageing
calendar_ageing.description: Minimum recommended package for a calendar-ageing campaign.
minimum_modules: storage at defined SOC and temperature

eis.label: Electrochemical impedance spectroscopy
eis.description: SOC-resolved impedance spectra for ECM parameterisation, ageing tracking, and mechanism attribution.
report_focus: Ohmic, charge-transfer, and diffusion resistance breakdown
minimum_modules: EIS acquisition at each SOC point in open-circuit condition

preconditioning.label: Preconditioning / formation
preconditioning.description: Stabilise early-cycle capacity before formal characterisation begins.
report_focus: Go / no-go for main test programme
minimum_modules: up to 10 cycles if stability not reached

standard_cycle.label: Standard reference cycle
standard_cycle.description: 1C discharge and CC-CV recharge reference cycle used as the comparison anchor and as the entry state for other methods.

constant_power_discharge.label: Constant power discharge
constant_power_discharge.description: Energy characterisation under a constant power load across a power matrix.
report_focus: Voltage vs time at each power step
minimum_modules: constant-power discharge at each target power level

dynamic_stress_test.label: Dynamic stress test
dynamic_stress_test.description: Standardised 360 s dynamic DST profile used to characterise transient response and energy recovery.
report_focus: Energy throughput per DST profile repetition
Temperature profile during the DST run
minimum_modules: repeat until Vmin or selected SOC range exhausted
optional_modules: scaled DST variant for different pack sizes

drive_cycle.label: Drive cycle performance
drive_cycle.description: Application-representative profile test (WLTP, NEDC, or custom BEV/PHEV duty cycle) for real-world energy and power characterisation.
report_focus: Range or energy throughput per profile replay

thermal_characterisation.label: Thermal characterisation
thermal_characterisation.description: Pseudo-adiabatic and thermostated-plate thermal mapping to measure heat generation and dissipation.
report_focus: Heat generation vs SOC and C-rate

thermal_impedance.label: Thermal impedance test
thermal_impedance.description: Sinusoidal thermal-impedance measurement to parameterise the thermal equivalent circuit of the cell.
minimum_modules: 25 C cell stabilisation with thermostated plate
sinusoidal heat excitation sweep (0.1 to 10 mHz)

quasi_static_thermal.label: Quasi-static thermal tests
quasi_static_thermal.description: Synchronised swelling / dilatometry measurement paired with an electrical capacity-style cycle.
report_focus: Cell thickness or strain vs SOC
Correlation between swelling and voltage curve

ageing_drive_cycle.label: Ageing drive cycle
ageing_drive_cycle.description: Drive-cycle ageing campaign with periodic reference characterisation checkpoints.
report_focus: Capacity retention vs drive-cycle equivalent cycles
DCIR / power capability drift vs checkpoint
minimum_modules: baseline RPT before first ageing block

constant_voltage_ageing.label: Constant voltage ageing
constant_voltage_ageing.description: Outline-only method for studying ageing under prolonged constant-voltage hold conditions. Requires a reviewed SOP before execution.
report_focus: Current decay profile during CV hold
Capacity check after CV storage period
minimum_modules: charge to target voltage at approved C-rate
CV hold at target voltage for approved duration
optional_modules: EIS before and after CV hold
